dimensions.name: End Goal
dimensions.probe: What does success look like for this output? What is the user trying to achieve?

dimensions.name: Target Audience
dimensions.probe: Who will use or consume this? What is their technical level?

dimensions.name: Technical Constraints
dimensions.probe: What platform, technology stack, tools, or frameworks must be used or avoided?

dimensions.name: Scale & Performance
dimensions.probe: What are the volume, size, speed, or throughput requirements?

dimensions.name: Output Format
dimensions.probe: What format, structure, or shape should the result take?

dimensions.name: Quality Level
dimensions.probe: Is this a quick prototype or a production-quality, maintainable deliverable?

dimensions.name: Edge Cases & Constraints
dimensions.probe: What failure modes, edge scenarios, or hard constraints must be handled?
